title: bulbophyllum auritum
intro: Bulbophyllum auritum, also known as the 'Golden Lip Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum auritum include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe irritated tissues. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
